# CWE-281 — Improper Preservation of Permissions (vulnerable) (pure stdlib)
lang: go
file: CWE-281-vulnerable.pure.go
variant: pure-go
---
package sample

import (
	"io"
	"net/http"
	"os"
)

// Vulnerable: copy recreates file with default permissive mode.
func BackupConfig(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
	if r.Method != http.MethodPost {
		http.Error(w, "method not allowed", http.StatusMethodNotAllowed)
		return
	}
	src := "/etc/app/config.toml"
	dst := "/backups/config.toml"
	in, _ := os.Open(src)
	out, _ := os.Create(dst)
	_, _ = io.Copy(out, in)
	in.Close()
	out.Close()
	w.WriteHeader(http.StatusOK)
}
